---
title: "Teaching"
---

I enjoy teaching at the intersection of neuroscience, machine learning, and quantitative methods. My teaching experience includes mentoring students in computational neuroscience as well as undergraduate instruction in chemistry.

---

### Teaching Assistant  
**Neuromatch NeuroAI Course** *(2024)*

- Teaching assistant for an international intensive course on computational neuroscience and artificial intelligence.
- Supported a cohort of approximately **15 students** through tutorials and discussions.
- Assisted students with machine learning concepts and neural data analysis.

<div style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">
<a href="https://neuromatch.io/neuroai-course/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
Visit Course Website
</a>
</div>

---

### Teaching Assistant  
**Second-Year Organic Chemistry**  
*University of Calgary (2018–2019)*

- Assisted with undergraduate course instruction.
- Guided students through organic chemistry topics and problem-solving.
- Supported student learning through peer-assisted teaching.

<div style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">
<a href="https://www.ucalgary.ca/student-services/student-success/learning-support/pass" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary">
Visit Website
</a>
</div>
